kw.name: Open SAP
kw.doc: Open SAP GUI or SAP Business Client.

kw.name: Connect to Server
kw.doc: Connect to the SAP server using the provided connection.

kw.name: Fill Text Field
kw.msg: The text field with the locator 'User' was filled.
kw.doc: Fill the text field specified by the locator with the content provided.

kw.name: Fill Text Field
kw.msg: The text field with the locator 'Password' was filled.
kw.doc: Fill the text field specified by the locator with the content provided.

kw.name: Fill Text Field
kw.msg: The text field with the locator 'Logon Language' was filled.
kw.doc: Fill the text field specified by the locator with the content provided.

kw.name: Push Button
kw.doc: Push the button with the given locator.

kw.name: Execute Transaction
kw.msg: The transaction with T-Code /nEC_TUTORIAL_TCD was executed.
kw.doc: Execute the transaction with the given T-Code.

kw.name: Fill Text Field
kw.msg: The text field with the locator 'Airline' was filled.
kw.doc: Fill the text field specified by the locator with the content provided.

kw.name: Fill Text Field
kw.msg: The text field with the locator 'Flight Number' was filled.
kw.doc: Fill the text field specified by the locator with the content provided.

kw.name: Save Screenshot
kw.doc: Save a screenshot of the current window to the given destination.

kw.name: Push Button
kw.doc: Push the button with the given locator.

kw.name: Select Table Row
kw.msg: The row with the locator '3' was selected
kw.doc: Select the specified table row(s) and return the corresponding row index(es).

kw.name: Push Button
kw.doc: Push the button with the given locator.

kw.name: Select Text Field
kw.msg: The text field with the locator 'Customer Number' was selected.
kw.doc: Select the text field specified by the locator or with the given content.

kw.name: Press Key Combination
kw.doc: Press the given key combination.

kw.name: Get Row Count
kw.msg: Counted the number of rows in the table.
kw.doc: Count the rows in a table.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Select Cell
kw.msg: The cell with the locator 'Adam Montero, Customer name' was selected.
kw.doc: Select the cell at the intersection of the row and column provided.

kw.name: Push Button
kw.doc: Push the button with the given locator.

kw.name: Select Tab
kw.doc: Select the tab with the name provided.

kw.name: Fill Cell
kw.msg: The cell with the locator '1, Passenger Name' was filled.
kw.doc: Fill the cell at the intersection of the row and column with the content provided.

kw.name: Fill Cell
kw.msg: The cell with the locator '1, Title' was filled.
kw.doc: Fill the cell at the intersection of the row and column with the content provided.

kw.name: Fill Cell
kw.msg: The cell with the locator '1, DOB of Passenger' was filled.
kw.doc: Fill the cell at the intersection of the row and column with the content provided.

kw.name: Push Button
kw.doc: Push the button with the given locator.

kw.name: Save Screenshot
kw.doc: Save a screenshot of the current window to the given destination.

kw.name: Read Statusbar
kw.doc: Read the contents of the statusbar. The return value is a dictionary with the entries 'status' and 'message'.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.
